title: Direct messages to remote users never delivered
description: In posting.rs create_status (lines 1231-1238), the 'direct' visibility case only adds local mentions (m.domain.is_none()) to the ActivityPub 'to' field. Remote mentions are silently dropped from addressing. Combined with the fact that delivery uses enqueue_to_followers (which sends to all follower inboxes, not to specific mentioned users' inboxes), this means: (1) the Create{Note} AP object has an empty or local-only 'to' field, (2) the activity is fanned out to followers' shared inboxes rather than to the mentioned remote user's inbox. Net effect: DMs to remote users (@user@remote.example) are never received by the remote server. The same exclusion of remote mentions from 'tag' array (line 1244-1253) means even if delivery happened, the receiving server wouldn't know who was mentioned. This also affects edit_status which has the same pattern. Fix: look up remote_accounts.actor_uri for remote mentions and add to 'to', add remote mention tags, and enqueue_delivery directly to the mentioned user's inbox.
